name: know-your-rights-and-claim-them
description: Amnesty International's guide for youth — understanding children's rights under the UN Convention on the Rights of the Child, identifying violations, and taking action through activism and legal channels.
useCase: Child rights education, identifying rights violations, safe activism for youth, legal navigation for young people, building campaigns for social change.
knownRisks: Legal advice varies by country — the Convention is international law but enforcement differs
The US has not ratified the Convention, so youth in the US have a different legal landscape
Activist actions carry real risks in some countries — safety assessment is critical
